name: GPT-4
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> GPT-1 -> GPT-2 -> GPT-3 -> GPT-4
summary: GPT-4 represented a massive leap in reasoning, factuality, and multimodal capability, reportedly using a mixture-of-experts architecture at an estimated 1.8T parameters. It achieved human-level performance on professional exams including the bar exam (90th percentile) and triggered a global conversation about AGI timelines, AI regulation, and existential risk, directly leading to executive orders and the EU AI Act.
